title: ornithogalum gramineum
intro: Ornithogalum gramineum, also known as the grass-leaved star of Bethlehem, is a plant species belonging to the family Asparagaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, Ornithogalum gramineum is often used as a tincture or infusion, typically combined with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
